problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Vagus. Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
